{{CargoRelic
|name=Holo-Space Projector
|class_id=20826
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=The holographic projection technology of the space-time projector simulates the features and environments of various alternate dimensions. Users are immersed in a holographic-based virtual environment, capable of real-time analysis and interpretation of complex information from different time-space dimensions.
|fame=12
|art=19
|fth=15
|civ=11
|tech=31
|ss1=In the Rift, INTEL gained +1%<br>Per 20 levels of Time Rift INTEL learned: INTEL gained +0.1%<br>Time Rift INTEL learned: 1000/1000
|ss2=In the Rift, INTEL gained +2%<br>Per 20 levels of Time Rift INTEL learned: INTEL gained +0.2%<br>Time Rift INTEL learned: 1000/1000
|ss3=In the Rift, INTEL gained +3%<br>Per 20 levels of Time Rift INTEL learned: INTEL gained +0.3%<br>Time Rift INTEL learned: 1000/1000
|ss4=In the Rift, INTEL gained +3%<br>Per 20 levels of Time Rift INTEL learned: INTEL gained +0.3%<br>Time Rift INTEL learned: 1000/1000
|ss7=In the Rift, INTEL gained +3%<br>Per 20 levels of Time Rift INTEL learned: INTEL gained +0.3%<br>Time Rift INTEL learned: 1000/1000<br> (Awakened)
}}
